title: review bugbot large diffs
purpose: G4.2 defines review bugbot large diffs for the agent-driven expert system. Verification & quality — evidence, goal_verify, anti-mistake.
scope: Owns `G4.2` only; siblings under `G4` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §9 — Branch G — Verification & quality plane (anti-mistake)](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#9-branch-g-verification-quality-plane-anti-mistake).
behavior_steps: Before S1+ workers improvise, the conductor runs compose-first resolution per [E2.1](E2.1-compose-resolve-capability-needed.md) and queries the unified catalog per [E1](E1-index.md) for scripts, playbooks, skills, and facts.
Librarian and workers receive bounded `allowed_reads` (max 5) per [E4.3](E4.3-context-allowed-reads-cap-max-5.md) from catalog composition results—not ad-hoc design doc grep during implement.

External truth lives in `docs/facts/` and ADRs in `docs/decisions/` per [E3](E3-index.md); hooks inject continue/start context from journal paths per [E4.2](E4.2-context-hooks-inject-continue-start.md).
When upstream specs or designs change, [E5](E5-index.md) staleness marks artifact-graph nodes stale and reconcile-stale re-enqueues affected work before pursuit assumes obsolete contracts.

If catalog miss would force L0 invent without promotion note, or staleness is ignored, Plane E stops at H2 rather than proceeding with divergent one-off tooling per [B4.4](B4.4-divergence-log-when-not-composing.md).
edge_cases: Operator closes laptop mid-loop â€” state.json must resume from last good dual-write.
Concurrent manual edit to queue JSON â€” conductor reloads queue each wake; last writer wins with journal note.
Flaky test â€” escalation S4 once, then H2 with evidence log; no silent retry loop.
Edge case `G4.2` variant 4: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Pass 3: add regression test or evidence path specific to `G4.2`.
Pass 3: cross-link related nodes in same branch index.
failure_modes: **Silent stop:** Agent ends turn without updating queue â†’ mitigated by /loop + check-hierarchy-queue.py EMPTY gate.
**False complete:** Item marked done without artifact â†’ audit-hierarchy-depth.py re-enqueues deepen pass.
**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.
implementation: Extend verify-router for goal-level suite invocation.
Wire CI: validate-workflow checks goal block when pursuit.mode=goal_autopilot.
Validate `G4.2` against SEC-15 release checklist and parent index links.
Document `G4.2` in parent index with verify command and release tag.
Add checklist row in SEC-15 release doc for `G4.2`.
acceptance: [ ] Named script, skill, or test path exists or is listed in SEC-15 release row
narrative: G4.2 defines review bugbot large diffs for the agent-driven expert system. Verification & quality — evidence, goal_verify, anti-mistake. In practice, the system before s1+ workers improvise, the conductor runs compose-first resolution per [e2.1](e2.1-compose-resolve-capability-needed.md) and queries the unified catalog per [e1](e1-index.md) for scripts, playbooks, skills, and facts, then librarian and workers receive bounded `allowed_reads` (max 5) per [e4.3](e4.3-context-allowed-reads-cap-max-5.md) from catalog composition results—not ad-hoc design doc grep during implement.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-g 2026-06-28 -->

Bugbot review triggers on large implement diffs—line-count and file-count thresholds from operator policy or pack overrides. Substantial feature work gets mistake-class scanning before push even when task verify passed, catching logic errors tests may miss.

Bugbot does not replace verify-router evidence; it adds review signal. Failed or blocking Bugbot outcomes route to conductor merge or H2; repeated issues on the same task pattern may enqueue platform promotion ([D2.1](D2.1-index.md)).
